content: ENGINE_MOUNT_REAR_RIGHT (Sedan-X) - method: Torque+Angle
Ensure mating surfaces and threads are clean
Install fastener by hand and verify alignment
Pre-tighten to 40 Nm
Final tighten to 85 Nm ± 5 Nm
Further tighten by 30 degrees
Verify torque (and angle if applicable) in the MES
Do not reuse torque-to-yield or stretch bolts after removal
Verify torque and angle values in MES and record results

Apply final torque of 120 Nm ± 10 Nm
Verify torque (and angle if applicable) in the MES

Verify torque and angle values in MES and record results
SEAT_FRAME_REAR_R (Hatch-A) - method: TorqueOnly

Install fastener by hand and verify alignment
Tighten to 45 Nm ± 5 Nm
